compare.title: Compare AI Visibility
compare.subtitle: Enter 2 to 4 domains to compare their AI visibility scores across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
compare.min_domains: Please enter at least 2 domains to compare.

home.badge: Track your brand across ChatGPT · Gemini · Perplexity
home.subtitle: Discover how AI assistants talk about your brand. Track mentions, compare with competitors, and get concrete recommendations to improve your AI visibility.

features.llm_desc: Query ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity simultaneously to get a comprehensive picture of your AI visibility.
features.score_desc: Get a single score (0-100) based on mention rate, position, sentiment, and LLM coverage.
features.reco_desc: AI-powered recommendations to improve your brand's presence in AI assistants.
features.competitor_desc: See who appears ahead of you in AI responses and understand why they rank higher.
features.history_desc: Track your visibility score over time and measure the impact of your optimizations.
features.realtime_desc: Watch your analysis unfold in real-time with live query-by-query results.

pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
pricing.free_desc: Perfect for trying out AI visibility tracking.
pricing.pro_desc: For marketers and founders serious about GEO.
pricing.agency_desc: For agencies managing multiple client brands.
pricing.faq_a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq_a2: One scan = one full analysis of a domain across all 3 LLMs (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity). Each scan runs ~6 queries per LLM, totalling 18 AI queries.
pricing.faq_q3: Do you offer a free trial for Pro?
pricing.faq_a3: Yes — the Pro trial gives you 14 days of full Pro access, no credit card required.
pricing.faq_a4: Your scan results are stored privately and never shared. We don't train AI models on your data.
